aboutSummary.label: Who We Are
aboutSummary.title: Committed to Changing Lives
aboutSummary.subtitle: BethGold Foundation is a registered NGO dedicated to uplifting individuals with disabilities and underserved communities through education, health, and empowerment.
aboutSummary.paragraph: We believe that in every disability there is ability. Our programs are designed to remove barriers, build dignity, and create lasting change — one person, one family, one community at a time.

callToAction.label: Get Involved
callToAction.title: Ready to Make a Difference?
callToAction.subtitle: Whether you donate, volunteer, or partner with us — your contribution changes lives.
callToAction.paragraph: Join our growing community of changemakers. Every act of generosity — big or small — helps us reach more people, run more programmes, and build stronger communities.
callToAction.imageAlt: Community members supported by BethGold Foundation
